basic_details.job_title: Central University of Kerala Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Kerala Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. CUK/EST/GF/GEN/2015 on the official website https://www.cukerala.ac.in. A total of 24 vacancies have been announced through the Central University of Kerala Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale wherever the grading system is followed) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university.

vacancy_details.Post Name: International Relations (BA(International Relations), Capital Centre, Thiruvananthapuram)

salary_details.details: Rs. 1500/- per lecture with a ceiling of Rs. 50,000/- per month for most posts. Hourly basis for Malayalam (BA(International Relations)), Hindi (Capital Centre, Thiruvananthapuram), Economics, and Sanskrit (Malayalam) (MA Malayalam).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty positions at Central University of Kerala?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 24 vacancies for Guest Faculty positions across various departments at the Central University of Kerala.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is a Master's degree with 55% marks in the concerned, relevant, or allied subject from a recognized Indian or foreign university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Guest Faculty positions is 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How should candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply by sending their resume and required documents via email to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 1500/- per lecture with a monthly ceiling of Rs. 50,000/- for most posts, while some positions are paid on an hourly basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will provide a direct download link.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Guest Faculty positions are contractual in nature, offering temporary employment opportunities.
